<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Ryan Melkonian — Strategy & Management Consultant</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,900;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #16181f;
    --surface: #1e2130;
    --surface-2: #252840;
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    --accent: #6eb5ff;
    --accent-warm: #f0a04b;
    --accent-soft: #8b9cf7;
    --text: #e8eaf0;
    --text-muted: #8b90a7;
    --text-dim: #555a72;
    --highlight: rgba(110,181,255,0.08);
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    min-height: 100vh;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: -30%; left: -10%;
    width: 60%; height: 60%;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(110,181,255,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 0;
  }
  body::after {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    bottom: -20%; right: -10%;
    width: 50%; height: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(139,156,247,0.05) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 0;
  }

  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(22,24,31,0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 0 48px;
    height: 64px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }
  .nav-logo { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 18px; color: var(--text); }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--accent); }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: none;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

  .wrapper { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 40px; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
  section { padding: 96px 0; }

  .hero {
    padding-top: 160px; padding-bottom: 96px;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px; align-items: center;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before { content: ''; display: block; width: 32px; height: 1px; background: var(--accent); }
  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 5vw, 68px);
    font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.05;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .hero h1 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent); }
  .hero-sub { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.75; color: var(--text-muted); max-width: 440px; margin-bottom: 40px; }
  .hero-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 40px; }
  .tag {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase; padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: 99px; background: var(--highlight);
    border: 1px solid rgba(110,181,255,0.2); color: var(--accent);
  }
  .tag.warm { background: rgba(240,160,75,0.08); border-color: rgba(240,160,75,0.2); color: var(--accent-warm); }
  .tag.soft { background: rgba(139,156,247,0.08); border-color: rgba(139,156,247,0.2); color: var(--accent-soft); }

  .contact-row { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .contact-item { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
  .contact-item a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .contact-item a:hover { color: #fff; text-decoration: underline; }

  .hero-card {
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 20px; padding: 40px;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-soft));
  }

  .headshot-wrapper { display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .headshot-circle {
    width: 120px; height: 120px; border-radius: 50%;
    overflow: hidden; border: 3px solid var(--accent);
    box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(110,181,255,0.2);
  }
  .headshot-circle img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top; }

  .hero-edu-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .hero-edu-item {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    padding: 12px 14px;
    background: var(--surface-2);
    border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .hero-edu-logo {
    width: 40px; height: 40px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    /* transparent background — no fill */
  }
  .hero-edu-logo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
  .hero-edu-text { min-width: 0; }
  .hero-edu-school { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
  .hero-edu-degree { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

  .slalom-badge {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
    padding: 16px 20px; background: var(--surface-2);
    border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .slalom-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: #00c47f; box-shadow: 0 0 12px #00c47f; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .slalom-badge-text { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); }
  .slalom-badge-text strong { color: var(--text); display: block; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; }

  .section-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 56px; }
  .section-label { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); white-space: nowrap; }
  .section-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
  .section-line { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: var(--border); }

  .exp-grid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; }
  .exp-card {
    background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px; padding: 36px 40px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: border-color 0.25s, background 0.25s, transform 0.2s;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .exp-card:hover { border-color: rgba(110,181,255,0.3); background: rgba(30,33,48,0.9); transform: translateX(4px); }
  .exp-card.active { border-color: rgba(110,181,255,0.4); background: rgba(30,33,48,0.95); }
  .exp-card-accent {
    position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-soft));
    border-radius: 3px 0 0 3px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.25s;
  }
  .exp-card:hover .exp-card-accent, .exp-card.active .exp-card-accent { opacity: 1; }
  .exp-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .exp-role { font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; color: var(--text); letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
  .exp-date {
    font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-muted);
    white-space: nowrap; padding: 3px 12px;
    background: var(--surface-2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 99px;
  }
  .exp-org { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 4px; margin-top: 8px; }
  .exp-location { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 16px; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; }
  .exp-summary { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--text-muted); }
  .exp-detail { display: none; margin-top: 20px; padding-top: 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .exp-card.active .exp-detail { display: block; }
  .exp-bullets { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .exp-bullets li { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.65; color: var(--text-muted); padding-left: 20px; position: relative; }
  .exp-bullets li::before { content: '→'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--accent); font-size: 12px; }
  .exp-skill-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-top: 20px; }
  .exp-skill-tag { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 99px; background: var(--highlight); border: 1px solid rgba(110,181,255,0.15); color: var(--accent); }
  .expand-hint { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-dim); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; margin-top: 16px; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .exp-card:hover .expand-hint { color: var(--accent); }
  .exp-card.active .expand-hint { display: none; }

  .skills-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; }
  .skill-group { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px; transition: border-color 0.25s; }
  .skill-group:hover { border-color: rgba(110,181,255,0.25); }
  .skill-group-label { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .skill-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; list-style: none; }
  .skill-list li { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
  .skill-list li::before { content: ''; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); flex-shrink: 0; opacity: 0.6; }

  .cert-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 16px; }
  .cert-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px 28px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; transition: border-color 0.25s, transform 0.2s; }
  .cert-card:hover { border-color: rgba(240,160,75,0.3); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .cert-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--surface-2); border: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .cert-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 4px; line-height: 1.4; }
  .cert-issuer { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); }

  /* EDUCATION — transparent logo wrap, no bg */
  .edu-card {
    background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px; padding: 36px 40px;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
    gap: 28px; align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 16px; transition: border-color 0.25s;
  }
  .edu-card:hover { border-color: rgba(139,156,247,0.3); }
  .edu-logo-wrap {
    width: 72px; height: 72px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    /* no background — logo has transparent bg now */
  }
  .edu-logo-wrap img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
  .edu-degree { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .edu-school { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent-soft); margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .edu-detail { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.7; }
  .edu-detail .detail-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-dim); display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; margin-top: 10px; }
  .edu-year { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 52px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--surface-2); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.04em; text-align: right; user-select: none; }

  .slalom-panel { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 20px; padding: 48px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 48px; align-items: center; }
  .slalom-panel-text h3 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .slalom-panel-text p { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.75; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .value-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; list-style: none; }
  .value-list li { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); padding-left: 16px; position: relative; }
  .value-list li::before { content: '◆'; position: absolute; left: 0; font-size: 6px; color: var(--accent); top: 6px; }
  .values-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; }
  .value-chip { padding: 10px 14px; background: var(--surface-2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 500; text-align: center; transition: border-color 0.2s; }
  .value-chip:hover { border-color: rgba(110,181,255,0.25); color: var(--text); }

  footer { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 40px 0; text-align: center; }
  footer p { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }

  .fade-up { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease; }
  .fade-up.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .progress-bar { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-soft)); z-index: 200; transition: width 0.1s; }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; padding-top: 120px; }
    .hero-edu-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .skills-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .cert-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .slalom-panel { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    nav { padding: 0 24px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .wrapper { padding: 0 20px; }
    .exp-card { padding: 24px; }
    .edu-card { grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; }
    .edu-year { display: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="progress-bar" id="progress"></div>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Ryan <span>Melkonian</span></div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#certifications">Certifications</a></li>
    <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
    <li><a href="#slalom">About Slalom</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<div class="wrapper">

  <section class="hero" id="home">
    <div class="fade-up">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">Strategy & Management Consulting</div>
      <h1>Ryan<br><em>Melkonian</em></h1>
      <p class="hero-sub">A results-driven consultant at Slalom bringing structure to ambiguous, multi-stakeholder environments — delivering across Project Management, Business Analysis, Agile delivery, and Customer Experience design.</p>
      <div class="hero-tags">
        <span class="tag">Project Management</span>
        <span class="tag">Agile Delivery</span>
        <span class="tag warm">Business Analysis</span>
        <span class="tag warm">Change Management</span>
        <span class="tag soft">CX & Service Design</span>
        <span class="tag soft">GenAI</span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-row">
        <span class="contact-item">📍 Seattle, WA 98109 — 600 Galer St., APT 319</span>
        <span class="contact-item">📧 <a href="mailto:melkonianryan17@gmail.com">melkonianryan17@gmail.com</a></span>
        <span class="contact-item">📞 (425) 281-6986</span>
        <span class="contact-item">🔗 <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ryan-melkonian-12886a155/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View my LinkedIn Profile →</a></span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fade-up" style="transition-delay:0.15s;">
      <div class="hero-card">
        <div class="headshot-wrapper">
          <div class="headshot-circle">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Ryan Melkonian" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-edu-grid">
          <div class="hero-edu-item">
            <div class="hero-edu-logo">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="WSU" />
            </div>
            <div class="hero-edu-text">
              <div class="hero-edu-school">Washington State Univ.</div>
              <div class="hero-edu-degree">BBA — Marketing, Psychology</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="hero-edu-item">
            <div class="hero-edu-logo">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mount Si" />
            </div>
            <div class="hero-edu-text">
              <div class="hero-edu-school">Mount Si High School</div>
              <div class="hero-edu-degree">Diploma · Snoqualmie, WA</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="slalom-badge">
          <div class="slalom-dot"></div>
          <div class="slalom-badge-text">
            <strong>Currently Active</strong>
            Strategy & Management Consultant — Slalom, May 2022–Present
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="experience">
    <div class="section-header fade-up">
      <span class="section-label">01 / Work</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Experience</h2>
      <div class="section-line"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-grid">

      <div class="exp-card fade-up" onclick="toggleCard(this)">
        <div class="exp-card-accent"></div>
        <div class="exp-header">
          <div class="exp-role">Project Manager</div>
          <div class="exp-date">2025</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-org">International Airline Merger (via Slalom)</div>
        <div class="exp-location">Seattle, WA</div>
        <div class="exp-summary">Led delivery for the integration of two global airlines into a single, unified contact center — managing 15+ stakeholders across strategy, technology, HR, and executive leadership.</div>
        <div class="exp-detail">
          <ul class="exp-bullets">
            <li>Managed cross-functional alignment across 15+ business and technical stakeholders, bridging strategy, technology, HR, and executive leadership.</li>
            <li>Facilitated all core Agile ceremonies across four major sprints, driving structured issue resolution, dependency management, and on-time progress toward a single operating model.</li>
            <li>Coordinated platform and process unification across both airlines, translating complex operational requirements into executable sprint work.</li>
            <li>Guided end-to-end training for 150+ contact center agents, standardizing tools, workflows, and CX protocols while preserving distinct brand identities.</li>
            <li>Developed and maintained a Smartsheet project portfolio to track dependencies, readiness, and risks across all workstreams.</li>
            <li>Delivered a seamless, unified contact center operation through cross-functional momentum, blocker resolution, and sustained stakeholder alignment through go-live.</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="exp-skill-tags">
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Agile Delivery</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Sprint Planning</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Change Management</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Smartsheet</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">UAT</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Agent Training</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="expand-hint">↓ Click to expand details</div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up" onclick="toggleCard(this)">
        <div class="exp-card-accent"></div>
        <div class="exp-header">
          <div class="exp-role">Project Manager — Executive Communications</div>
          <div class="exp-date">2024</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-org">Global Philanthropic Organization (via Slalom)</div>
        <div class="exp-location">Seattle, WA</div>
        <div class="exp-summary">Managed the end-to-end review and delivery of all executive media deliverables for one of the world's largest philanthropic organizations, operating in an Agile, sprint-based model.</div>
        <div class="exp-detail">
          <ul class="exp-bullets">
            <li>Led quality review of 100+ media deliverables — including Tough Q&A, Press Releases, Media Briefs, and Key Messages — ensuring consistency, accuracy, and strategic alignment.</li>
            <li>Managed end-to-end preparation for 50+ high-stakes media interactions, enabling the Co-Chair and CEO to engage effectively with top global outlets.</li>
            <li>Administered a centralized SharePoint site as the single source of truth for executive media deliverables, ensuring version control and cross-team visibility.</li>
            <li>Collaborated closely with communications officers and stakeholders to gather requirements, align on messaging, and execute against tight timelines.</li>
            <li>Oversaw quality assurance and delivery processes for the Core Media team, maintaining high standards across all materials and interactions.</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="exp-skill-tags">
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Executive Communications</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">QA Management</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">SharePoint</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Requirements Gathering</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Sprint Delivery</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="expand-hint">↓ Click to expand details</div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up" onclick="toggleCard(this)">
        <div class="exp-card-accent"></div>
        <div class="exp-header">
          <div class="exp-role">ERP Implementation Project Manager</div>
          <div class="exp-date">2023 – 2024</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-org">North California State Agency (via Slalom)</div>
        <div class="exp-location">San Francisco, CA</div>
        <div class="exp-summary">Served as the sole Project Manager for a multi-organization Oracle ERP implementation, leading a 13-person Agile PMO and collaborating with 60+ Subject Matter Experts and Change Champions.</div>
        <div class="exp-detail">
          <ul class="exp-bullets">
            <li>Led a 13-person PMO consisting of workstream leadership, technical and strategic project managers, orchestrating cross-functional engagement between Slalom, the client, and a third-party system integrator.</li>
            <li>Owned and facilitated all Agile ceremonies and managed sprint backlog planning, resulting in the client's successful transition from six legacy systems to Oracle.</li>
            <li>Planned and executed three multi-month sprints, developed executive-facing reporting, and maintained a centralized SME hub for transparency and artifact access.</li>
            <li>Managed data-intensive initiatives including end-to-end data migration, coordinating multiple parallel projects and overseeing data readiness, validation, and cutover activities.</li>
            <li>Required a high level of coordination, executive influence, financial oversight, and stakeholder relationship management to deliver sustained business value.</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="exp-skill-tags">
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Oracle ERP</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">13-Person PMO</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Agile Delivery</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Data Migration</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Executive Reporting</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="expand-hint">↓ Click to expand details</div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up" onclick="toggleCard(this)">
        <div class="exp-card-accent"></div>
        <div class="exp-header">
          <div class="exp-role">Research & Data Analyst</div>
          <div class="exp-date">2023</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-org">Global Biopharmaceutical Company (via Slalom)</div>
        <div class="exp-location">Seattle, WA</div>
        <div class="exp-summary">Analyzed time-study and stakeholder data across Global Patient Operations to identify process bottlenecks, variability drivers, and opportunities for automation and optimization.</div>
        <div class="exp-detail">
          <ul class="exp-bullets">
            <li>Reviewed documentation and crafted a current-state process map across Global Patient Operations workflows.</li>
            <li>Conducted interviews with 17 stakeholders to identify and map key pain points, including those impacting data migration readiness and downstream system integration.</li>
            <li>Generated 12+ short-term action items and proposed six long-term recommendations to support seamless implementation and future-state improvements.</li>
            <li>Synthesized findings into actionable process maps and reporting artifacts that informed organizational design decisions.</li>
            <li>Developed an impact assessment and partnered with stakeholders to prioritize initiatives based on business value, data risk, and implementation feasibility.</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="exp-skill-tags">
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Process Mapping</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Stakeholder Interviews</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Data Analysis</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Impact Assessment</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="expand-hint">↓ Click to expand details</div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up" onclick="toggleCard(this)">
        <div class="exp-card-accent"></div>
        <div class="exp-header">
          <div class="exp-role">Business Analyst & Project Manager</div>
          <div class="exp-date">2022 – 2023</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-org">Global Cloud Services Provider (via Slalom)</div>
        <div class="exp-location">Seattle, WA</div>
        <div class="exp-summary">Mapped the global development and implementation process for how solutions, changes, and information are shared with field sellers — then built a new Change Management Framework.</div>
        <div class="exp-detail">
          <ul class="exp-bullets">
            <li>Mapped the global development and implementation process for how solutions, changes, and information flow to field sellers across the organization.</li>
            <li>Managed an 8-person team to establish a new Change Management Framework emphasizing change consolidation, improved landing, and enhanced adoption.</li>
            <li>Presented client with a phased implementation plan and timeline outlining structured rollout milestones.</li>
            <li>Contributed to the creation of two new assets and deliverables supporting the client's strategic objectives.</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="exp-skill-tags">
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Change Management</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Process Mapping</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Business Analysis</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Field Sales Ops</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="expand-hint">↓ Click to expand details</div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up" onclick="toggleCard(this)">
        <div class="exp-card-accent"></div>
        <div class="exp-header">
          <div class="exp-role">Current & Future State Service Design PM</div>
          <div class="exp-date">2022 – 2023</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-org">Local State Agency (via Slalom)</div>
        <div class="exp-location">Seattle, WA</div>
        <div class="exp-summary">Led service design working sessions to develop a service blueprint identifying customer pain points and improvement opportunities across agency-facing touchpoints.</div>
        <div class="exp-detail">
          <ul class="exp-bullets">
            <li>Conducted working sessions with a core team to co-develop a service blueprint, mapping both current and future-state experiences.</li>
            <li>Identified customer pain points and prioritized improvement opportunities through structured qualitative analysis.</li>
            <li>Formulated survey questions for stakeholders and mapped personas to ground design decisions in real user context.</li>
            <li>Delivered a phased implementation plan with an estimated timeline, providing the agency a clear roadmap for service transformation.</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="exp-skill-tags">
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Service Design</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Journey Mapping</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Persona Development</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Survey Design</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="expand-hint">↓ Click to expand details</div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card fade-up" onclick="toggleCard(this)">
        <div class="exp-card-accent"></div>
        <div class="exp-header">
          <div class="exp-role">Customer Marketing Intern</div>
          <div class="exp-date">Jun – Aug 2021</div>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-org">PitchBook Data</div>
        <div class="exp-location">Seattle, WA</div>
        <div class="exp-summary">Supported customer marketing efforts at a leading financial data and software company, applying consumer research and behavioral analysis skills in a fast-paced environment.</div>
        <div class="exp-detail">
          <ul class="exp-bullets">
            <li>Contributed to customer marketing initiatives, gaining exposure to data-driven marketing operations at scale.</li>
            <li>Applied coursework in Consumer Behavior and Consumer Judgment and Decisions to real-world marketing analysis.</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="exp-skill-tags">
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Customer Marketing</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Consumer Research</span>
            <span class="exp-skill-tag">Data Analysis</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="expand-hint">↓ Click to expand details</div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="skills">
    <div class="section-header fade-up">
      <span class="section-label">02 / Capabilities</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Skills</h2>
      <div class="section-line"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skills-layout">
      <div class="skill-group fade-up">
        <div class="skill-group-label">Project & Program Management</div>
        <ul class="skill-list">
          <li>Agile / Waterfall Delivery</li>
          <li>Sprint Planning & Backlog Management</li>
          <li>Program & Portfolio Oversight</li>
          <li>Risk & Dependency Management</li>
          <li>Executive Reporting</li>
          <li>Cross-functional Coordination</li>
          <li>Change Management</li>
          <li>Stakeholder Influence</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-group fade-up" style="transition-delay:0.1s">
        <div class="skill-group-label">Business Analysis & CX</div>
        <ul class="skill-list">
          <li>Requirements Gathering</li>
          <li>Process Mapping (Current & Future State)</li>
          <li>Journey Mapping & Persona Development</li>
          <li>Service Design & Blueprinting</li>
          <li>Stakeholder Interviews</li>
          <li>Survey Design</li>
          <li>Impact Assessment</li>
          <li>Human-Centered Organizations</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-group fade-up" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
        <div class="skill-group-label">Tools & Technology</div>
        <ul class="skill-list">
          <li>Jira & Confluence (Atlassian)</li>
          <li>Smartsheet / Asana</li>
          <li>Microsoft 365 / SharePoint / Copilot</li>
          <li>Lucid Chart / Miro</li>
          <li>GenAI & LLM Tooling</li>
          <li>Data Management & Analysis</li>
          <li>Oracle ERP (Implementation PM)</li>
          <li>MCP Integration Standards</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="certifications">
    <div class="section-header fade-up">
      <span class="section-label">03 / Credentials</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Certifications</h2>
      <div class="section-line"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-grid">
      <div class="cert-card fade-up">
        <div class="cert-icon">🏅</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">Professional Scrum Master I (PSM I)</div>
          <div class="cert-issuer">Scrum.org</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert-card fade-up" style="transition-delay:0.08s">
        <div class="cert-icon">🤖</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">GenAI for Project Management</div>
          <div class="cert-issuer">Vanderbilt University</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert-card fade-up" style="transition-delay:0.12s">
        <div class="cert-icon">🎨</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">How to Design Integrated Service Experiences</div>
          <div class="cert-issuer">Interaction Design Foundation (IxDF)</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert-card fade-up" style="transition-delay:0.16s">
        <div class="cert-icon">🧠</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">GenAI with Large Language Models (LLMs)</div>
          <div class="cert-issuer">DeepLearning.AI</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cert-card fade-up" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
        <div class="cert-icon">📊</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cert-name">Business Behavioral Research</div>
          <div class="cert-issuer">Washington State University</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="education">
    <div class="section-header fade-up">
      <span class="section-label">04 / Academic</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Education</h2>
      <div class="section-line"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="edu-card fade-up">
      <div class="edu-logo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Washington State University" />
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="edu-degree">Bachelor of Business Administration</div>
        <div class="edu-school">Washington State University — Carson College of Business</div>
        <div class="edu-detail">
          Major: Marketing &nbsp;·&nbsp; Minor: Psychology
          <span class="detail-label">Relevant Coursework</span>
          Consumer Behavior &nbsp;·&nbsp; Consumer Judgment and Decisions &nbsp;·&nbsp; Strategic Management &nbsp;·&nbsp; Marketing Research
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="edu-year">2022</div>
    </div>

    <div class="edu-card fade-up" style="transition-delay:0.1s">
      <div class="edu-logo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mount Si High School" />
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="edu-degree">High School Diploma</div>
        <div class="edu-school">Mount Si High School</div>
        <div class="edu-detail">Washington State College Readiness Curriculum &nbsp;·&nbsp; Snoqualmie, WA</div>
      </div>
      <div class="edu-year">2018</div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="slalom">
    <div class="section-header fade-up">
      <span class="section-label">05 / Firm</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">About Slalom</h2>
      <div class="section-line"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="slalom-panel fade-up">
      <div class="slalom-panel-text">
        <h3>Fiercely Human. Outcome-Driven.</h3>
        <p>Slalom is a business and technology consulting firm operating across 52 offices in 12 countries, partnering with clients across the Global 1000 and 500+ public sector organizations. The firm leads with outcomes — from strategy through delivery — across industries spanning healthcare, financial services, technology, manufacturing, retail, and public & social impact.</p>
        <p>Slalom's partnerships with AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft, Salesforce, Snowflake, and Tableau position it at the intersection of business strategy and cutting-edge technology enablement.</p>
        <ul class="value-list">
          <li>Trusted advisor, respectful challenger, and unwavering champion to clients</li>
          <li>Deeply human culture guided by 10 core values</li>
          <li>Purpose: help people and organizations dream bigger, move faster, build better tomorrows</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:16px;">Core Values</div>
        <div class="values-grid">
          <div class="value-chip">Do what is right</div>
          <div class="value-chip">Drive connection</div>
          <div class="value-chip">Inspire passion</div>
          <div class="value-chip">Fuel innovation</div>
          <div class="value-chip">Take ownership</div>
          <div class="value-chip">Stay curious</div>
          <div class="value-chip">Celebrate authenticity</div>
          <div class="value-chip">Build better futures</div>
          <div class="value-chip">Focus on outcomes</div>
          <div class="value-chip">Smile.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

</div>

<footer>
  <div class="wrapper">
    <p>Ryan Melkonian &nbsp;·&nbsp; Strategy & Management Consultant &nbsp;·&nbsp; Slalom &nbsp;·&nbsp; Seattle, WA &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2026</p>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const scrolled = window.scrollY;
    const max = document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
    document.getElementById('progress').style.width = (scrolled / max * 100) + '%';
  });
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); observer.unobserve(e.target); }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
  function toggleCard(card) {
    const wasActive = card.classList.contains('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.exp-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
    if (!wasActive) card.classList.add('active');
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
